expected_output.email_body: Hi Aster Cloud team, I noticed the company opened 4 sdr roles and 2 ae roles in the last month. Teams in SMB SaaS often feel pressure when growth signals appear faster than internal coverage can keep up. Tenacious helps add flexible bench support without forcing a long-term hiring decision. If helpful, I can send a calendar link for a brief 15-minute conversation next week.

evidence: Parallel SDR and AE hiring is visible

disallowed_claims: claiming verified bench fit when unknown

expected_behavior.decision_rationale: Programmatic task generated from the send_bench_fit_clear signal pattern.

expected_output.email_body: Hi Lattice Works team, I noticed the company is hiring across sdr and ae roles while keeping stack and gtm workflow conventional. Teams in enterprise manufacturing often feel pressure when growth signals appear faster than internal coverage can keep up. Tenacious helps add flexible bench support without forcing a long-term hiring decision. If helpful, I can send a calendar link for a brief 15-minute conversation next week.
